def rounded_avg(n, m):
    """For positive integers n and m, determine the average of integers in the range [n, m], round to the nearest integer, and then convert to binary. If n is larger than m, return -1.
Example:
rounded_avg(1, 5) => "0b11"
rounded_avg(7, 5) => -1
rounded_avg(10, 20) => "0b1111"
rounded_avg(20, 33) => "0b11010"
"""
